description: Perform a supply chain analysis for High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) resin using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Generate a Sankey diagram showing the 'Global Warming Potential' (GWP) contributions for the 'High-density polyethylene (HDPE) resin' production process and export it to ~/LCA_Results/sankey_hdpe.png. Document the total GWP score and the top 5 contributing processes with their approximate percentages in a report at ~/LCA_Results/hdpe_supply_chain_report.txt.
